_comment: HOW THIS WORKS: 'latest' is the version AVAILABLE to users. The running build is CURRENT_VERSION inside wealthflow-update-system.js. To announce an update: publish new app files AND set 'latest' here to the new number. Users on an older version see the 'Update available' banner. 'type' = full | minor | security. List a version in 'mandatory' to force it.

sections.title: New
items: Check for updates button and a full system self-check in Settings.
Update types are now labelled — Full, Minor, or Security.

sections.title: Improved
items: The update system now reliably detects newer versions and shows the banner.
Smoother, more accurate install progress.

sections.title: Security
items: June monthly security hardening for stored data and sync.

sections.title: New
items: In-app updates with What's New, agreement, PIN, backup-first and a live progress bar.
Send Feedback right from Settings.
Card & Account Registry is back.

sections.title: Security
items: All AI data encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.

sections.title: Fixed
items: System self-check no longer shows a false "CHECK" on Cloud sync — it now detects Firestore correctly (14/14).

sections.title: Security
items: June monthly security maintenance.

sections.title: New
items: Your feedback is now scored and prioritised automatically — security and crashes first.
Auto-install toggle for urgent security updates (like Android).
A red badge on Settings shows when an update is waiting.

sections.title: Improved
items: The update system is smarter and clearer, with full/minor/security labels.

sections.title: Security
items: Monthly security maintenance.

sections.title: New
items: Automatic feedback prioritisation and release scheduling.

sections.title: Security
items: Monthly security maintenance.

sections.title: New
items: Self-healing: if the app ever crash-loops after an update, it now auto-recovers to the last good version and keeps your data safe.
Smarter feedback understanding: reports are grouped by meaning, not just matching words.

sections.title: Security
items: Monthly security maintenance.

sections.title: Fixed
items: Privacy: the feedback view now shows only your own reports, never other users.
Feedback sent while offline now syncs and appears once you reconnect.
App version now shows consistently everywhere.
Software Update section reliably appears in Settings.

sections.title: New
items: Attach a screenshot to your feedback.

sections.title: Security
items: Per-user data isolation verified; monthly security maintenance.

sections.title: Fixed
items: The Software Update section now always appears in Settings — fixed a timing issue where it could be missing.

sections.title: Fixed
items: Swiping down from the top no longer reloads the app or shows an error — pull-to-refresh is now disabled.

7.15.3.headline: Software Update section no longer disappears

sections.title: Fixed
items: Clicking any button in the Software Update section no longer hides the whole section — it is now a permanent part of Settings.
App version is now consistent in the footer and sidebar too.

sections.title: Fixed (critical)
items: Fixed the black screen some users saw after updating. The app now has a Boot Guard that automatically clears the broken update and restores a working version — your data is always safe.

sections.title: Security
items: This is a mandatory recovery update.

7.16.1.headline: Critical: fixed frozen Syncing with cloud

sections.title: Fixed (critical)
items: Fixed the app freezing on Syncing with cloud and never letting you in. The cloud sync now has a strict time limit and always lets you into the app, even on a slow or offline connection.

sections.title: Security
items: Mandatory stability update.

notes.7.21.0: CRIB credit-report intelligence (AI analysis + advice in your language, dedup, history charts, score factor, delete-sync) · Google Cloud Vision OCR across the whole app (sharper reading of dense/zoomed-out statements) · encrypted HTML e-statements now open on every device (Nations Trust AMEX) · Income tab: matching card spacing + Table/Schedule views + sorting · AI now writes a useful note per imported transaction (no more "from statement") · repeated same-category charges accumulate per month with a tap-to-view history · faster startup · AI advisor now knows your CRIB + subscriptions + received income
